category_sources: Official repository https://github.com/gdraheim/zziplib describes ZZIPlib as providing read access on ZIP archives and unpacked data.
source_facts.description says libzzip provides read access on ZIP archives.
display_name_sources: Official repository https://github.com/gdraheim/zziplib uses the display name ZZIPlib.
docs_sources: Official repository README at https://github.com/gdraheim/zziplib links to http://zziplib.sourceforge.net/ for more detailed documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/gdraheim/zziplib; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official repository https://github.com/gdraheim/zziplib describes ZIP archive access, zlib compression, and a POSIX-style API.
source_facts.description identifies ZIP archive read access.
